title: phyllodes cylindrica
intro: Phyllodes cylindrica, also known as the 'Tea Tree' or 'Cylindrica', is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils which have antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phyllodes cylindrica include treating acne, wounds, and fungal infections, as well as relieving digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Phyllodes cylindrica include teas, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
